title: Gear Fourth Awakens — Part 3
description: Luffy reveals Gear Fourth and overwhelms Doflamingo with a new form built to break the tyrant.
scene: On pages 14–18, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo, King Riku, Bartolomeo move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The second day I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hm? Awoken, have you, Trafalgar?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Leave me here and go...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What?! What nonsense are you talking!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Thirteen years... thirteen years I have lived on, all for the day I would take down dofla- mingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I've done....HA-... everything I could.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I have to just leave the rest to Straw Hat-ya...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If he wins...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I want to witness it with my own eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And if he falls, I too ought to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: DIE here, with him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm the one that dragged him into this fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Leave me and go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Someone seems to

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: traffy-kun, the positions of the captains in a pirate alliance ought to be equal, no?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Luffy is here because he wants to be. He does not engage in fights he has no personal reason to.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Leave me... go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Please.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: It looks like you've already made up your mind, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Nico Robin, go on ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Cabbage- Run!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: suicide isn't gonna fly with me. I'll stay here too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: That'll be our compro- wise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: If you wanna die, it'll only be after me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Robin-san, Bartolomeo's made us a staircase!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Roodin- Zenbai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Now... take this and go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What-?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Ah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Grizzly Magnum!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: You're wide open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Ugu ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I thought you said something about not letting law's attack go to waste?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: When are you finally going to get around to defeating me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: The one-hour-limit you have is the amount of time it will take for bird cage to completely close.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Aughh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: There are bound to be some in this country with a bad leg...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Old ones who are bed- ridden...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Babes still suckling on their mothers' teats... Fufufu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Which of them shall be the first casualty?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: In about 30 minutes or so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: We shall find out! That is when the first wave of people will begin dying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: In about 40 minutes, we'll be able to hear the screams from here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: And in so minutes... this country will be stained crimson- red, almost as if someone had crushed a tomato over it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: And one hour from now, all their voices shall cease!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: I doubt you care what happens to dressrose, but...

summary: This part focuses on gear fourth awakens, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
